name: Common Room
description: Common Room — Community intelligence platform aggregating signals from GitHub, Slack, Discord, and social media.

seo.title: Common Room — Customer Support SDK / In-app Helpdesk
seo.meta_description: Common Room: Common Room — Community intelligence platform aggregating signals from GitHub, Slack, Discord, and social media.

when_to_use: Aggregating GitHub, Slack, and Discord signals into one feed
Identifying top community advocates for a developer program
Triggering CRM actions based on community engagement signals
Measuring community health across platforms with one dashboard
Routing high-intent community users to sales pipeline

pros: Unified signals across GitHub, Slack, social
Good for dev rel and PLG attribution
Sales and community triggers in one place
cons: Setup requires many integrations to shine
Data hygiene depends on your sources
review.verdict: The leading community intelligence tool for PLG and dev rel, but ROI demands mature data practices.
review.best_for: Dev rel and PLG teams tying community signals to pipeline and retention.
review.not_for: Small communities without multi-channel presence or structured GTM motion.
